name: Cherry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the beaten egg, milk, almond extract, and vegetable oil until well blended.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring only until combined. If using an electric mixer, mix on low speed for about 30 seconds.
4. Batter will remain lumpy. Gently fold in the drained cherries and chopped nuts (if using).
5. Grease a muffin tin and fill each cavity about 2/3 full with batter, handling it as little as possible.
6. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes or until done.
